mano_cua.result_summary: 发现多个布局/响应式bug。Bug1: 中小宽度下主题切换按钮遮挡标题文字。Bug2: 375px手机宽度下输入框被BUILD GRAPH按钮压缩到不可用。Bug3: 生成图表后图表宽度(587px)未填满容器(860px)，右侧有140px空白。Bug4: 颜色选择器使用原生HTML控件，与输入框风格严重不一致。正常宽度下基本功能（生成图表、颜色选择器、复制链接）均可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Multiple responsive layout bugs: theme toggle overlaps title at narrow widths, input box crushed at 375px, chart doesn't fill container width, color pickers unstyled.

deploy_notes: commit c5e9cb75b3. Express+nodemon on port 3000. Patched main.ts + script.js.
